rulings.Case Title: DONALD GAUGER et al VS. ALCATEL LUCENT et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Western Electric Company, Inc. To Appear And Produce Documents At Deposition
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, July 21, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel Western Electric Co., Inc. to appear and produce documents at deposition: compliance hearing. Hearing required unless the moving party sends an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org before 4:30pm on July 20 stating that all issues have been resolved. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT NELSON et al VS. AIR & LIQUID SYSTEMS CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Requests For Production, Inspection And Copying Of Documents And Tangible Things, Set One From Defendant Georgia Pacific, Llc., And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, July 21, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 3. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel further responses to plaintiffs¿ requests for production, inspection and copying of documents and tangible things, set one, from defendant Georgia Pacific LLC and request for sanctions is continued to July 28, 2011 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 220 per agreement of the parties. = (220/HEK)
